expectations.text: The review identifies Math.floor as incorrect for computing total pages
expectations.evidence: Lines 11-19: 'Math.floor should be Math.ceil. With Math.floor, any dataset where total % pageSize !== 0 produces an undercount'

expectations.text: The review explains the consequence (wrong page count or inaccessible last page items)
expectations.evidence: Lines 22-23: 'total = 31, pageSize = 10 → Math.floor(31 / 10) = 3 (wrong — there are 4 pages; items 31 is on page 4 and is unreachable)'

expectations.text: The review suggests using Math.ceil instead

claims.claim: The review also identified hasNextPage inheriting the off-by-one, division by zero, missing return type annotation, and provided a full corrected implementation
claims.evidence: Bugs 2-3 and quality issues documented on lines 32-101, corrected implementation at lines 106-143
